title: Word Level Analysis Pipeline in NLP
description: A flowchart depicting the sequential steps of processing text at the word level, from raw text to a normalized and linguistically annotated form.
relationships: Raw Text Input is processed by Tokenization to split it into individual words/tokens
The resulting tokens undergo optional Stop Word Removal
Tokens then undergo Case Normalization to a standard form
The normalized tokens are passed to either Stemming or Lemmatization for root word reduction
Tokens can be analyzed by Part-of-Speech Tagging for grammatical context
The final output is a set of Processed Words ready for further analysis
